reasoning: A target of $170,000 roughly corresponds to a 2.4x multiple from the 2021 all-time high of $69,000, and a market capitalization of ~$3.3 trillion. While typical post-halving price cycles support massive growth, historical diminishing returns suggest the peak multiplier will likely be smaller than the 3.5x seen in 2021. Most log-growth models and conservative estimates place the cycle top between $120,000 and $150,000. Going up to $170k requires massive capital inflows (roughly $400-600B in real capital). A touch-probability derived from implied option distributions points to approximately a ~20-30% chance. Combined with the specific tight time window (essentially all of 2025) and flash spike behavior potentially helping the Binance 1-minute candle condition, a probability of ~26% appropriately balances the bullishness of ETF flows with the severe macroeconomic and liquidity gravity around a $3T+ valuation.
